Uses of Package
liquibase.plugin

  • Packages that use liquibase.plugin 
    Package Description
    liquibase.change
    The change package contains the available database "changes".
    liquibase.change.core
    Technically, a Change expresses an intention for alter the structure of the Database.
    liquibase.change.custom
    Although Liquibase tries to provide a wide range of database refactorings, there are times you may want to create your own custom refactoring class.
    liquibase.command  
    liquibase.command.core  
    liquibase.executor  
    liquibase.executor.jvm  
    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem  
    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem.core  
    liquibase.hub  
    liquibase.hub.core  
    liquibase.integration.ant  
    liquibase.license  
    liquibase.logging  
    liquibase.logging.core  
    liquibase.plugin  
    liquibase.sdk.executor  
    liquibase.servicelocator  
    liquibase.ui  
    org.liquibase.maven.plugins  
  • Classes in liquibase.plugin used by liquibase.change 
    Class and Description
    AbstractPlugin
    Convenience base class for Plugin implementations.
    AbstractPluginFactory
    Convenience base class for all factories that find correct Plugin implementations.
    Plugin
    Interface for objects designed to be pluggable in Liquibase.
    PluginFactory
    Interface for classes that manage Plugins.
  • Classes in liquibase.plugin used by liquibase.change.core 
    Class and Description
    AbstractPlugin
    Convenience base class for Plugin implementations.
    Plugin
    Interface for objects designed to be pluggable in Liquibase.
